sentences.target: Auf der Wiese spielen die Kinder.

translations.de: Auf der Wiese spielen die Kinder.
translations.en: The kids are playing on the meadow.
translations.es: Los niños están jugando en el prado.
translations.fr: Les enfants jouent dans la prairie.
translations.it: I bambini stanno giocando nel prato.
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺草地上面玩。
translations.pt: As crianças estão brincando no gramado.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang chơi trên bãi cỏ.
translations.nl: De kinderen spelen op het gras.
translations.hi: बच्चे घास के मैदान में खेल रहे हैं।
translations.id: Anak-anak sedang bermain di padang rumput.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが原っぱで遊んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition forming a fronted prepositional phrase; expresses location and selects dative for a static setting.
Definite article, dative singular feminine, modifying 'Wiese' as the object of the preposition.
Feminine noun, dative singular; object of the preposition 'auf' in a locative sense.
Finite verb, present 3rd person plural; occupies the V2 position after the fronted PP; agrees with the subject 'die Kinder'.
Definite article, nominative plural, introducing the subject noun.
Plural noun (singular is neuter), nominative plural; subject of 'spielen'.

sentences.target: Neben der Wiese steht ein alter Baum.
sentences.reading: /ˈneːbən deːɐ ˈviːzə ʃteːt aɪn ˈaltɐ baʊm/

translations.de: Neben der Wiese steht ein alter Baum.
translations.ipa: /ˈneːbən deːɐ ˈviːzə ʃteːt aɪn ˈaltɐ baʊm/
translations.en: An old tree stands next to the meadow.
translations.es: Junto al prado hay un árbol viejo.
translations.fr: Il y a un vieil arbre à côté de la prairie.
translations.it: Accanto al prato c'è un albero vecchio.
translations.ru: Рядом с лугом стоит старое дерево.
translations.pt: Ao lado do gramado há uma árvore velha.
translations.tr: Çayırın yanında eski bir ağaç var.
translations.vi: Bên cạnh bãi cỏ có một cây cổ thụ.
translations.nl: Naast het gras staat een oude boom.
translations.hu: A rét mellett áll egy öreg fa.
translations.hi: घास के मैदान के पास एक पुराना पेड़ है।
translations.el: Δίπλα στο λιβάδι στέκεται ένα παλιό δέντρο.
translations.nb: Ved engen står et gammelt tre.
translations.id: Di sebelah padang rumput ada sebuah pohon tua.
translations.sv: Bredvid ängen står ett gammalt träd.
translations.ro: Lângă pajiște este un copac bătrân.
translations.da: Ved engen står et gammelt træ.
translations.ja: 原っぱのそばに古い木が立っている。

tokens.explanation: Preposition forming a fronted PP; expresses proximity and normally takes dative for static relation.
Definite article, dative singular feminine, modifying 'Wiese' as object of 'Neben'.
Feminine noun, dative singular; complement of the preposition 'neben'.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; V2 after the fronted PP; agrees with the subject 'ein alter Baum'.
Indefinite article, nominative singular masculine, introducing the subject noun.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Baum'; nominative singular masculine with strong inflection (-er) after 'ein'.
Masculine noun, nominative singular; subject of 'steht'.

sentences.target: Die Picknickdecke liegt auf der Wiese.

translations.de: Die Picknickdecke liegt auf der Wiese.
translations.en: The picnic blanket lies on the meadow.
translations.es: La manta de picnic está en el prado.
translations.fr: La nappe de pique-nique est sur l'herbe.
translations.it: La coperta da picnic è stesa sul prato.
translations.pt: A toalha de piquenique está estendida no gramado.
translations.vi: Tấm trải picnic nằm trên bãi cỏ.
translations.nl: Het picknickkleed ligt op het gras.
translations.hi: पिकनिक की चादर घास के मैदान पर बिछी है।
translations.el: Η κουβέρτα για πικνίκ είναι απλωμένη στο λιβάδι.
translations.id: Tikar piknik terhampar di padang rumput.
translations.ro: Pătura de picnic este întinsă pe pajiște.
translations.ja: ピクニックシートが原っぱに敷かれている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine, introducing the subject noun.
Feminine compound noun, nominative singular; subject of 'liegt'.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; denotes location/state; agrees with the subject.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; selects dative when indicating static location.
Definite article, dative singular feminine, modifying 'Wiese' as the object of 'auf'.
Feminine noun, dative singular; complement of the preposition 'auf'.

sentences.target: Ich gehe kurz über die Wiese.

translations.de: Ich gehe kurz über die Wiese.
translations.en: I'm walking across the meadow for a moment.
translations.es: Voy a cruzar el prado un momento.
translations.fr: Je traverse la prairie un instant.
translations.pt: Vou atravessar o gramado um instante.
translations.vi: Tôi đi ngang qua bãi cỏ một lúc.
translations.nl: Ik loop even over het gras.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर के लिए घास के मैदान से होकर जा रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Θα περάσω για λίγο μέσα από το λιβάδι.
translations.id: Saya berjalan menyeberangi padang rumput sebentar.
translations.da: Jeg går lige over engen et øjeblik.
translations.ja: ちょっと原っぱを横切っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 1st person singular; main verb of the clause.
Adverb modifying 'gehe'; indicates short duration.
Preposition introducing a directional PP; selects accusative here to express motion across.
Definite article, accusative singular feminine, modifying 'Wiese' as the object of 'über'.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; complement of the preposition 'über' indicating the path of motion.
